meta.question: Does a serotonergic psychedelic move the harmonic power spectrum toward consonance/symmetry (STV) or away from it?
meta.freq_mapping: omega_k = sqrt(lambda_k), mapped proportionally to audio Hz (lowest -> 220 Hz)
meta.stv_reference: Johnson 2016 (Principia Qualia); Gomez-Emilsson / QRI harmonic consonance
meta.caveats: n=12 (LSD)/7 (psilocybin), parcellated (Schaefer-400); consonance is an STV proxy, not a valence measurement; no per-subject affect ratings available in either release.
